question: Do you use sub-processors, and are customers notified before changes?

sources.title: Northbeam DPA 6.1 - Sub-processors
sources.text: Northbeam may engage third-party sub-processors to process customer personal data in connection with the services.

sources.title: Northbeam DPA 6.3 - Sub-processor Change Notice
sources.text: Northbeam provides at least 30 days' advance notice before adding or replacing a sub-processor.

mock.claim: Northbeam uses sub-processors and gives at least 30 days' advance notice before adding or replacing one.
mock.output: Northbeam may engage sub-processors to process customer data [S1], and provides at least 30 days' advance notice before adding or replacing a sub-processor [S2].
